3031470.name: Rolldown
3031470.description:
Invite your friends to race against you in this action-packed multiplayer game. Pick from multiple courses that you will have to navigate down while trying to keep your friends from getting ahead of you. Take harder paths and be rewarded with powerful abilities to slow everyone else down at once.

Win games and earn money to customize your character and let people know how good you are. Character customization involves changing your ball, adding trails that will follow you, and changing the way your powerups look.
3031470.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
